subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God! Verily, I lay my face upon the dust and humble my brow in the soil of lowliness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اننی اضع وجهی علی الثری و اعفر جبینی بتراب الذل و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition
